reviews.title: Great replacement bands for the Fitbit Charge 5
reviews.text: These bands fit well on the Fitbit Charge 5, as a replacement for a damaged band or just to change up the look now and then.  They are easy to install and remove and they do give an entirely different look to the Charge 5. I have the Large size and they are the same length as the original band that came with the Fitbit.  The colors as presented in listing are accurate and, in fact, I liked the teal and purple even more when I saw them in person.  There's only one noticeable difference between these bands and the original band.  The original band is quite smooth while these bands have some friction to them when you run you fingers over them.  Neither texture is better than the other. They're just different. My original band is black and absent the difference in feel, there's no real distinction vs. the black band that I received in this six pack.

reviews.title: Great activity tracker with AMAZING Battery Life.
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:e0fda475d57018948d4bdf5116c091bf]] I had a different version activity watch that was way more expensive to match my phone. For the cost this watch does just about everything I need it to for way less money.

A few things I love about the watch...the Battery Life. OMG the battery life! It lasted me a full week with wearing it to bed most nights, through multiple exercise walks and a few work outs, and hundreds of notifications from my messaging apps and phone calls. It's easy to clear the notifications I receive on the watch. I love that it tracks my sleep, heart rate, and stress levels easily. I also tested out in my pool for swimming and it was waterproof without having to shake the watch or turn on any special modes to keep it watertight.

I haven't figured out of it auto detects a work out but that could be because I obviously don't work out that much.

I tested it against my health app on my phone and they were pretty accurate against each other info steps and mileage. I can't figure out how to get the watch and the app to register my GPS coordinates to see the map of my walks but I could be missing the settings.

The app that gives the data is easy to navigate and update any settings. Seems very similar to other track laps I've used.
A few things I'm not liking about this watch...
I feel like the band and the watch itself that comes with the watch is a little too big for my wrist. And I have a bigger wrist for a female at my size. The watch face is bigger than some of my friends apple watches and taller than my old Samsung gear fit watch. I can SEE notifications on the watch but I can't respond or give a quick response to any messages. For Whatsapp or Facebook Messenger I wouldn't expect that but for SMS messages I would like to be able to give a quick text back either by speaking a response or by selecting from some quick options.

Those are really my only 2 complaints. I like this watch and will continue to use!

reviews.title: Such a great Apple Watch dupe!
reviews.text: This smart watch works great! It’s also so cute and the band has lots of holes for adjusting. The only difference I see that’s noticeable is the watch band is a flimsier rubber. But it also makes it feel more comfortable than my Apple Watch. Would make a great gift as well!

reviews.title: Did the job for a week, then it drowned
reviews.text: I charged the watch out of the box.  Followed instructions and setup was pretty much straightforward.  There is a decent amount of sports mode available.  I mainly use run, walk, and swimming.  For walk and run the data captured was okay for duration, calories, distance, number of steps, pace, heart rate. and nighttime monitoring sleep was interesting.  Then I took it for laps in the pool, and that is when it did not do well.  The ad shows person swimming in pool, but I don't believe it can survive in the pool.  because the watch died.

reviews.title: A sluggish, inaccurate, subpar sports/health smart watch.
reviews.text:
I needed a backup sports smart watch for my Apple Watch. Let's check out this Veryfit watch.

What works:
Charged up in about 2-3 hours from 60% battery level.
Easy to install the Veryfit app and pair with my old iPhone 12 Pro.
Has many of the basic sports watch functions: stopwatch, alarm, timer, along with biometrics: Heart rate, Blood oxygen monitoring, Stress level, Breath training, Sleep, etc.
Big, easy to read watch face, only a bit narrower than my 44mm Apple Watch.
A variety of watch faces to download.
Nice, soft, comfortable watch straps.

What don't work:
Once linked up to my iPhone, app takes some effort to set up.
Can only receive notifications and phone call alerts, no relay of calls.
Heart rate monitor is erratic with a wide range of random readings. My resting heart rate is 56bpm yet this watch measures a range of 62 to 125bpm at various times.
Requires about 25s to get each biometric reading.
What's up with the 3-2-1 countdown to start each exercise? Start/Stop is what most users prefer.
Perhaps the Android version works better?
Don't expect too much from this $34.99 smart watch (after -30% off coupon on Feb. 19, 2023) but there are other smart watches in this price range that function better.

title: Vowor 4G Smartwatch for Kids with Sim Card, Waterproof Phone Watch with WiFi LBS GPS Tracker Video Chat SOS Camera Alarm Clock Anti Lost Watches Children Boys Girls Birthday Gift Age 3-15 (Black)
description:
Vowor Smart watches 4G for Kids
Kids smartwatch supports 4G/3G/2G Nano sim card with data and voice plans.
GSM Bands:
US: B2/B5
3G Bands (WCDMA):
US: B2/B5
4G Band(FDD TDD):
US:B2/4/5/7/12/17
Note:
1. you need to have voice and data plan to make the kids phone watch works properly 2. The Vowor 4G kids phone watch is NOT compatible with Verizon or Sprint, we recommend T-Mobile, Speedtalk and AT&T. But it is ok if your own's phone (parent's) card is Verizon or Sprint. The Vowor kids smartwatch doesn't support other APP except Leefine.
Q&A:
1. Why the watch doesn’t have the network(The watch shows "Search ... " for a long time)
(1) The SIM card is not overdue. (2) Check the upper left corner of the watch interface for stable signal icons or up and down arrows. If no, please restart the watch. (3) There may be no set the correct APN.
2. Why the watch cannot recognize the SIM card
(1) Confirm that the SIM card is not overdue. (2) Confirm that the SIM card is installed in the right direction. (3) Power off before card insertion. (4) Change the region and try again.
3. Why can't I make a video call
(1) Confirm that the SIM card has data and the network signal is stable. (2) Check whether the APP side is disabled for video calls. (3) Other family members who want video calls need to have a Leefine account and bind the watch. (4) Whether all permissions of APP needed are granted. (5) The APP needs to be opened, run and work in the background. Only the video call is initiated on the watch end, the APP end can receive the push message. (6) The video call has just ended. It will take 5 minutes for the watch end to call again.
Package Included:
1 x Kids smartwatch 1 x USB cable 1x User manual 1x Watch screen protector 1x sim card
features: 【Vowor 4G Kids Smart watch】: the smartwatch kids 4G has all functions you need: Face-talk (video calling), wifi LBS GPS Tracker, geofencing, Pedometer, Voice chat, Texts, Anti-lost, Class Mode, HD Camera, Historical tracker, Safe zones, Remote monitoring, SOS, alarm clock, low battery notification etc. It is a great gift for your kid 3-15 years old.

【Two-way Calling】: the Vowor 4G kids phone watch supports video calling and voice calling, you can chat with your kids face to face, but also can make a voice call. Make sure your sim card have the plan with Voice & Data: voice plan is for calling, and data plan is for network.

【4G WIFI LBS GPS Tracker】: Double position technology based on AGPS, Location Base on Cell Tower Station means double safety for kids. GPS is suitable for outdoor(especially in open areas),with a little inaccurate; WIFI is suitable for indoor, the accuracy depends on the carrier's backend database; LBS depends on the density of the communication base station and where you are, the inaccurate is relatively large. The watch choose GPS first, then WIFI, and finally the LBS. At the same time, parent

【Safety Protection】: 4G smartwatch for Kids equipped with an LBS/GPS/WIFI system that accurate location, you can check the real-time location of your kids and history activity footprint. You can also set the child's range of activity, if the child leaves the set area, the geofencing feature will alerts you. Accurate activity tracker, built-in speed sensor.

【1-year Warranty】: The kids smartwatch is made of high quality material, anti-fall and durable. The band strap is made of soft Silicone, it is very comfortable to wear it and it does not scratch the hand. We will provide 1-year warranty, replacements such as band strap or data cords will be send out for free. If you have any problems about our smart watches, Please feel free to contact us first. We will reply you within 24 hours.

reviews.title: The watch does a lot
reviews.text:
UPDATE: I was to early in writing my review. What I have noticed today is if Watch Call is connected to Bluetooth, you cannot use “Hey Siri” on the phone. So I disconnected Watch Call from Bluetooth and I could use Siri. However, now I can’t get Watch Call to reconnect to
Bluetooth. I have powered the watch off and on and that hasn’t helped. If Watch Call has to be reset each and every time to connect that is a deal
breaker. I will reach out to the seller, but it’s more likely I will return.

It’s a little larger than what I wanted, but overall it’s a nice watch. EXCEPT, the manual is Awful. It leaves so much out where you have to spend so much time trying to figure things out.

reviews.title: Bluetooth
reviews.text: What this product doesn't state is that while the watch is connected to your phone it will not let you to connect to wireless earbuds, wireless speakers, or even hear you Dexcom alarm!! Dexcom warns diabetics of high and low blood sugar levels. It's extremely important to hear those alarms. I didn't reach out to the seller but while you can disconnect the phone to get earbuds to work that means all features of the phone doesn't work.

reviews.title: I was worried that this cable damaged my watch.
reviews.text: I bought this item as extra charging cables for my Vivomove Style, which has physical watch hands in addition to the electronic display. Every time I use this charger instead of the OEM charger, the time shown by the physical hands is hours off and I have to realign.  It also seems to become much less sensitive to touch until I plug it back into the OEM charger to reset it.  The Vivomove Style will keep the time on the physical hands 2 weeks after the battery dies (and I've never seen it not keep accurate time), so it wasn't a dead battery issue.  I was hoping to have more than one cable to charge my watch but based on the issues I'm having,  I'm going back to the OEM cable.

reviews.title: Easy to set up, very accurate, keeps me updated with many aspect of my health
reviews.text:
I really appreciate this watch and the features it has. First off, the smart watch was very easy to pair to my phone. I have an Android phone, and it only took a few minutes to pair the watch with my phone.
First enable Bluetooth and find the device listed as "C20"

Next, download the app that's shown in the QR code. Once you have the watch paired via Bluetooth to your smart phone and the app is downloaded, your watch ready to go, and should be syncing to your smart phone. The connection has been great thus far; it hasn't disconnected/lost connection to my phone.

As someone who has suffers from pulmonary lung disease, I was very excited when I found out this smart watch has the capability to track my oxygen saturation, heart rate, and blood pressure. In addition, you don't have to do anything, the watch will automatically to measurements periodically throughout the day.

It's helping me monitor and compare results over a few days. I suggest authorizing Google Fit so your hearth history is accessible when it. For me, it helps to have a history when I meet with my pulmonologist.

The watch has great standby battery life, and it's light weight. After m three days it's only dipped minimally in available battery percentage. I highly recommend this!

**Updated**

So it's been several days now since I first posted the review and I am amazed how little the battery has drained. Needless to say this smartwatch has fantastic standby battery life; especially considering it's constantly looking for/measuring heart rate. As you can see from the photos the readings are very accurate. I own a pulse oximeter and a blood pressure monitor to keep my pulmonary hypertension in check. My resting heart rate is 95 bpm, which may seem high, but the reading is accurate and normal which makes this product more the reassuring.

reviews.title: Great Watch!
reviews.text: Ok, I have had fitness watches from Samsung to Fitbit to Garmin and this one is the best....especially for the price.  First thing since turning 60 I need a watch I can read in the sunlight.  This has a brightness level I actually do not have to turn it all the way up and the workout data is big enough to read. I think all the health data is correct, but do not trust the Blood Pressure readings because of the science behind it. Actually do not trust any BP on a fitness watch.  There is a lot of customization you can do......I recommend a custom watch face along with setting up quick view on a schedule. I am now going to see if I can get a spare charging cord,

reviews.title: Cheap, Inaccurate, but Cheap
reviews.text:
What works, the clock.
What doesn't work, everything else.
Bought in August, really tried to give it a chance. I knew for the price it was a gamble.

reviews.text:
Like the look, heft, easy set up.

But I question the accuracy since driving 1 miles and it's counted 30 steps, this is AFTER it logged 82 steps during at my desk.

3 month update. Battery life is still excellent however the watch has stopped connecting to the app

6 month update: Batter life is excellent, I notice it has started to decline, but that could also be heavier use. Step count still seems a bit wonky, but not egregiously off. The Strap is starting to break at the clasp and I will need to replace as soon as I'm able to find a replacement.

reviews.title: Nice
reviews.text: Having used different smart watches was looking forward to this one. But it disappointed me. Accuracy on everything was off compared to reality. Other smart watches for less were more accurate. I returned said watch.

title: GOOWJUER Kids Smart Watch for Boys Girls - HD Touch Screen Sports Smart Watch for 4-12 Years Kids Watches with Camera 16 Learning Games Recorder Alarm Music Player for Children Teen Students (Pink)
features: 🎈16 Funny Games: It includes exciting 16 video games includes "2048", "Basketball Shoot master", "Bee war", "Pinball hit bricks", "Car grab goods", "Eat gold", "Ultimate racing", it will help kids find and capture more interesting things beyond the real world. Your kids gonna like this feature.

🔖About Children's Watch: Upgraded children's watch, We provide an SD card (built-in) in the product, equipped with 1.54-inch high-definition large screen, smooth and comfortable touch feeling, silent mode. The strap is made of soft safety silicone material, which is comfortable, stable and breathable to wear.

📸 Camera & Recorder & Mp3 Player: With Free Micro SD card, you can take selfie pictures, record your voice, and save in the watch. You can via sd card reader to upload the pictures and voice on your pc. You can play the music in the memory cardby selecting Audio Player (Note: The watch only supported *.mp3 files please copy to sd card- “My Music” folder before playing.).

💡Kids Watch: No need sim card, No complicated settings, don’t need to download app, don’t need to connect cell phone, all the functions are built-in the watch, very easy to operate for kids. OR you only need the watch as time learning toys or game player, then it’s a great gift for your baby, kids, boys and girls.

🎪More useful features: (1). Time and date: Support 12/24 hr format; (2). Alarm clock; (3).Album; (4).Record; (5).Calculator; (6). Support multiple languages: English (default), French, Spanish, German, Italian. We believe this smart watch will bring a healthy and happy childhood to the children. We commit to offer the best customer service and promise return refund policy if you're not satisfied with the products.

reviews.title: Smart watches
reviews.text: My grandchildren love them

reviews.title: Good for price
reviews.text: Nice unit seems very durable. Very easy to set up

reviews.title: Does NOT work
reviews.text: This doesn’t work!!! You have to buy a plan (I did even though the ad doesn’t say that, I’m out of time before Christmas so I just had to make it work!) and it still doesn’t work. It just sits there with no signal and doesn’t dial out or receive calls despite saying we’re in a coverage area. What a SCAM!!!!

reviews.title: so bad
reviews.text: Battery life is very short. You have to charge it often. The touch is not very sensitive like the old cell phone used ten years ago. And you can't adjust the volume of the music. The accompanying user's manual is a complete mess with no idea what it says.

reviews.title: Great little watches
reviews.text: Works well but couldn’t figure out hoy to get the SIM card in

title: LFUTARI Smart Watch Compatible with iPhone and Android Phones, Fitness Tracker with Heart Rate Monitor, Sleep Monitor & Blood Oxygen Saturation, 5ATM Waterproof Smartwatch for Women Men - Black
description: ※※※Please carefully read the User Manual before using it. Any questions, please feel free to contact the seller for help. (Go to Your Order, Find the order ID in the list, Click 'Contact with us'). ※※※ 【14 Sports Modes】 Including Outdoor Run, Outdoor Walk, Outdoor Cycle, Indoor Run, Indoor Cycle, Hiking, Yoga, Rowing Machine, Elliptical Machine, Dynamic Cycling, Cricket, Pool Swimming, Open Swimming and Others. 【Sedentary Reminders】 Reminds you to stand up and move when you are busy at work or sit for a long time. 【Alarm Clocks】 You can set up to 10 alarms easily for everyday tasks such as waking up, appointments, and more. 【Deep Breath Guide】 Our fitness watch can guide your breathing and help you find moments of calm throughout the day, making you feel relaxed. 【Control your Music】 You can control the up/down song, volume up/down of the current player directly through the watch, it's helpful when you are on the go or when your phone is not at hand. Smart Phone System Requirements iOS 11.0 & higher Android 6.0 & higher Bluetooth 4.0 & below Specifications Sync: Bluetooth 5.0 Screen: 1.3" TFT LCD Battery Capacity: 210mAh Working Voltage: 5V-500mA Working Temperature: -10℃ to 40℃ Weight: 1.27oz (36g) Waterproof Rating: 5ATM Working Time: 5-7 days What's in the Box? Smartwatch with bands  Charging cable User manual Quick start guide ※※※Please note: Smart watch data cannot be used for medical purposes. The monitoring data is for reference only. If you need medical help, please contact a professional doctor.※※※
features: 【Smart Watch for Men and Women】Features a 1.3-inch TFT-LCD full touch screen with a simple and vivid interface. 5 levels of brightness are available so you can easily view the screen in sunlight, and it will auto adjust brightness at night with night mode on. The screen lights up automatically when you lift and turn your wrist. Skin-friendly and soft bands fit different wrist sizes.

【All Day Activity Tracking】Supports 14 sports including walking, running, cycling, yoga, swimming and more. Accurately record all-day activities such as steps, distance, calories burned, miles walked, active minutes. Connect your GPS on your smartphone to see your real-time pace and distance during your outdoor activities and record your workout route map in the app.

【Healthy in Every Day】the latest advanced sensor for accurately monitor your real-time heart rate, blood oxygen (SpO2) level. Auto-track analyze your sleep quality(deep sleep, light sleep and wake up time) to help you get a better understanding of your health and and make reasonable adjustment on your lifestyle.

【5ATM Waterproof & Long Battery Life】Enjoy up to 7 days extra-long battery life, and our fitness tracker watch is designed with 5ATM waterproof, which means you can wear it without worries even while swimming. This watch also has many pratical tools such as alarm clock, music controller, deep breathing guide, sedentary reminder, stopwatch, timer and more.

【Smartwatches for Android IOS Phones】Compatible with most iOS 11.0 and Android 6.0 above, Bluetooth 4.0 below smartphones. Download and install our custom app (please check page 5 of the manual for details), bind this smartwatch to your phone, you can receive alerts of calendar, incoming calls, SMS, APP notifications and SNS (Messenger, WhatsApp, Skype, Twitter, etc) and preview the messages, never let you miss anything important things (note: you can't reply to messages or make calls).

【Multiple Dials & Custom Watchface】this smartwatch itself comes with 3 default dials, you can change it via watch's setting page. Also there are 14 dials in the dial gallery in our custom app, you can go download and install them to your watch at any time, and you can also choose a photo from your phone album as the background of your watch.

reviews.title: Useful smartwatch
reviews.text: Battery life is good! Lasts as long as advertised. BPM seems accurate. I can manage my basic music controls. The watch face is a bit small. This would be great for a child. The app is the true star and it connects to Google Fit.

reviews.title: Perfect size!! Thin and durable.
reviews.text: These are perfectly sized between the two sizes you get from Fitbit. Plus they are way thinner and more feminine. They don't pop off the watch either. A+
These bands are perfect. They fit the Fitbit Charge 5 perfect. The slim style is a good  fit for my small wrist.

reviews.title: Better slim band, does not fall off!
reviews.text: Nice improvement over the wider band that came with the fitbit, it does not irritate my wrist as much as the original one. Like having the 3 diff colors, and best of all they do NOT fall off like a leather one I tried.

reviews.title: Comfort
reviews.text:
Like the comet of the watch band.
I have a small wrist and the way it folds the excess band in underneath the band is great.

reviews.title: I love the slender style!
reviews.text: This fits as if fitbit had a Medium band. If you need a large, it may be snug. But it's perfect for me. I love the slim band! It makes the watch so much less bulky. And the fitbit clicks right into the clasps and feels secure. I'm getting more colors for sure.
